description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events, excluding dependabot branches. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest), Python versions (3.7-3.11, pypy-3.7-3.9), architectures (x64, x86), and environments (with/without Praat tests, GCC, Clang, Release). Each job checks out the code, sets up Python, installs requirements, and runs tests or builds documentation.
